label: Thesis Anchor Missing
description: A world without a clear, testable thesis has no anchor. Rules float free. Invariants have no purpose. The world cannot be validated.

causal_translation.trigger_text: Thesis clarity is below 25% — the world has no testable structural claim.
causal_translation.rule_text: Without a thesis, there is nothing to simulate. Rules become arbitrary constraints with no explanatory power.
causal_translation.shift_text: The world loses its anchor. Every invariant, rule, and gate becomes unjustified.
causal_translation.effect_text: World integrity reduced to 20% of baseline. Thesis anchor: MISSING.
